# AI Note-Taking Landscape

## Summary

The AI note-taking market is moving toward tools that combine capture, summarisation, and action extraction. Users expect to add raw material in many formats and receive organised notes without manually cleaning up the source.

## Key Points

- Multi-format ingestion is a core expectation: documents, images, links, audio, and plain text.
- Users care about trust and traceability, so source files should stay linked to generated notes.
- Local-first storage can be a strong differentiator for privacy-conscious users.
- Markdown output keeps notes portable and easy to edit.

## Action Items

- Compare Mianotes against three popular note apps.
- Define which note sections should be generated by default.
- Decide how much source metadata appears in the frontend.

## Questions

- Should users be able to regenerate a note from the original source?
- Should generated action items become first-class objects later?
